freshness_policy: No runtime evidence exists; every control remains score 0 until exact observed evidence replaces planning references.

gates.invalidation_trigger: The first executable vertical slice or any gate evidence is added
gates.revisit_trigger: After the first executable vertical slice

gates.n_a_rationale: No existing implementation is being evolved.
gates.revisit_trigger: An existing implementation becomes the target

gates.n_a_rationale: No legacy implementation or refactor seam exists.
gates.revisit_trigger: A legacy path is introduced into scope

gates.n_a_rationale: The target is a non-deployed local planning example.
gates.revisit_trigger: A public, preview, or production deployment is selected
